metric_value: Must support integration with vital business systems

Well positioned to deliver comprehensive, fully integrated Internet-based e-Business supply-chain solution
notes: Study conclusion — note: sponsored by Oracle; independence limited

metric_value: e-Business winners will leverage Internet to build dynamic supply nets — assembling and adjusting supply chains for rapid response to customer demand
notes: Prescient framing of modern agile supply chain concept

metric_name: Oracle e-Business Suite market position prediction
metric_value: Oracle positioned as comprehensive e-Business supply chain leader over next 5 years

metric_name: Oracle EBS market position — actual outcome
metric_value: Oracle E-Business Suite 12.2.15 released 2025; support extended through 2035; still widely deployed enterprise platform
notes: Oracle EBS maintained leadership; however SaaS ERP (Workday, SAP S/4HANA Cloud) emerged as alternative

metric_value: Ariba acquired by SAP for $4.3 billion in 2012; became SAP Ariba — major supply chain platform
notes: Ariba, implied competitor in study, thrived rather than failing; market consolidated
